name: AGENTS.md Auto-Loader
description: Automatically discovers and loads AGENTS.md files from the project root to the current working directory, replicating codex's project-level instruction loading logic. Uses hooks.json UserPromptSubmit hook to capture $XBOT_PROJECT_DIR, and a stdio context enricher to inject the content into the system prompt.
author: xbot

context_enrichers.name: agents-md
context_enrichers.description: Injects AGENTS.md instructions discovered from project root to CWD
